overview: A premium, mobile-first monthly budgeting and investment planner designed for Indian families and couples. Helps users divide their take-home salary across household needs, emergency safety, investments, and long-term family goals using structured allocation rules.
features: Monthly take-home income input with Indian Rupee formatting
Conservative, Balanced, and Aggressive allocation mode selector
3-part salary split: Essentials, Emergency, Investments dashboard
Investment allocation with donut chart across Equity, Debt, Commodities, and Crypto
Equity roadmap: Large Cap, Mid Cap, Small Cap breakdown
Debt breakdown: Liquid, Short Duration, Target Maturity funds
Goal-based family plan: Child Education, Retirement, Home Purchase, Vacation
WhatsApp share button for partner sharing
